popularStory.headline: Gruffudd ap Cynan (c. 1055-1137)
popularStory.description: Gruffudd ap Cynan (c. 1055-1137), sometimes written as Gruffydd ap Cynan, was King of Gwynedd from 1081 until his death in 1137. In the course of a long and eventful life, he became a key figure in We …

zh.lifeSummary: 當King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys於1055年3月8日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，他的父親King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd41歲，母親Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin30歲。他於大約1080年與Angharad ferch Owain在愛爾蘭度布林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾享年82歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys于1055年3月8日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林时，他的父亲King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd41岁，母亲Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin30岁。他于大约1080年与Angharad ferch Owain在爱尔兰度布林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1137年在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾享年82岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cynan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

en.lifeSummary: When King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys was born on 8 March 1055, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, his father, King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd, was 41 and his mother, Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, was 30. He married Angharad ferch Owain about 1080, in Dublin, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1137, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys est né le 8 mars 1055, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Angharad ferch Owain environ 1080, à Dublin, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1137, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys am 8. März 1055 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd 41 und seine Mutter Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin 30. Er hat um 1080 in Dublin, Irland Angharad ferch Owain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1137 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys è nato il il 8 marzo 1055 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Angharad ferch Owain circa 1080, nel Dublin, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1137, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysが1055年3月8日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父King Cynan ab Iago of Gwyneddは41歳，母Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublinは30歳であった。約1080年にアイルランドダブリンでAngharad ferch Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで82歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(이)가 1055년 3월 8일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 아일랜드 드블린에서 Angharad ferch Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys nasceu em 8 de março de 1055, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad ferch Owain aproximadamente 1080, em Dublin, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1137, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys родился 8 марта 1055 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad ferch Owain около 1080 г. в местности дублинь, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1137 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.from 1081 to 1137: mai le 1081 e o'o I le 1137

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys nació el 8 de marzo de 1055, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, King Cynan ab Iago of Gwynedd, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ragnhild Olafsdotter , Princess of Dublin, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Angharad ferch Owain aproximadamente 1080, en Dublin, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1137, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
